CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Continued To Mar-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

H. Nelson Meeks, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MARIA ESTRADA-SANABRIA.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SUSIE CHRISTIAN MANN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 50 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Marial Olivia Estrada sworn and examinded on her own behalf through Spanish Interpreter Maria Viviana Estrada (daughter).
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $16,175.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $535.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $16,710.00
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Continued To Jul-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
